## 📋 Pull Request

**Branch**: `feature/00N-` or `fix/00N-`  
**Target**: `develop` (never `main`)

---

### What does this PR do?
<!-- One paragraph summary -->

### Type of change
- [ ] New transport implementation
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Tests / QA
- [ ] Infrastructure / Docker / CI
- [ ] Documentation

### Checklist
- [ ] Branch follows `feature/00N-` or `fix/00N-` naming
- [ ] Target branch is `develop` (not `main`)
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check src` passes
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] New/changed behaviour has unit tests
- [ ] Error paths have typed exceptions from `kit_mcp.errors`
- [ ] Enums updated if new transport/auth/error codes added
- [ ] README / docs updated if public API changed

### Testing notes
<!-- How to test this manually if needed -->
